# Noblesville Tent & Event

> Premium tent, table, and chair rentals delivered, set up, and taken down across Noblesville and all of Hamilton County, Indiana. 5.0 stars on Google (71+ reviews). Family-owned, based in Noblesville.

Phone: (317) 676-5901
Website: https://noblesvilletent.com/
Service area: Noblesville, Carmel, Fishers, Westfield, Zionsville, Cicero, Sheridan, Arcadia, Atlanta, Fortville, McCordsville, Pendleton, Tipton, Kirklin (Indiana)
What is included: every tent rental includes delivery, professional setup, and takedown. Tables, chairs, linens, dance floors, and lighting available.
Tent sizes: 10x10 and 10x20 pop-ups; high peak frame tents 20x20, 20x30, 20x40, 20x60, 30x40, 40x40; frame tents 30x60 and 40x60.
Packages (tent + tables + chairs, one price): The Backyard Party 20x20 seats 32; The Celebration 20x30 seats 48; The Debut 20x40 seats 64; The Estate 30x40 seats 96; The Gala 40x40 seats 126; The Homestead 30x60 seats 112; The Intimate 10x20 seats 24; The Cafe umbrella table sets seat 8 each.
Pricing: itemized quotes only, generated at https://noblesvilletent.com/io_quoteform/
